head_commits: d48c00b docs(plan): cosmetic polish (Subproject D) implementation plan

33576ec style(bookings/new): tokenize category palette + form fields to design canon

high: H1 /bookings/new category palette collapse — 15-slot CATEGORY_PASTEL_CLASSES had 6 unique tints with 9 collisions (3× emerald, 3× indigo, 3× rose, 2× amber/teal/accent). Widened to 7 canon tints (rose, amber, emerald, teal, accent, indigo, slate) with zero collisions; getCategoryColorClass() body unchanged.
medium: M1 /admin/scanner LookupCard still used inline STATUS_COLORS map + raw <span> despite prior claim of StatusPill migration. Replaced with STATUS_VARIANTS map + <StatusPill> component. Required adding new 'alert' variant to StatusPill (rose-soft / rose / rose-border) for MISSING unit status — purely additive, no existing consumer regression risk.

deferred_notes: H2 Missing Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer on 9 earlier commits (14507ad, b03754e, a68ad11, f59ef92, d2e5256, 33576ec, bdf9be1, 6679d1c, 0981146). Accepted as LOW by re-review. Rationale: global git-safety rule in ~/.claude/rules/superflow-enforcement.md forbids rewriting published history / force-push. Trailer is attribution convention, not correctness. PR body documents Claude-assistance.

M2 Test-infra scope creep (vitest + @testing-library + jsdom + @vitejs/plugin-react added as devDeps). Accepted. Plan Task 3 mandates TDD for ApprovalTimeline component; web workspace had zero test harness before this. Dev-only deps, don't ship to users, unlock future web-component TDD. 4/4 ApprovalTimeline tests pass.
L1–L2 minor polish notes (low severity) — acknowledged, no action required

non_blocker_notes: UI-only refactor. No schema, API, or business-logic mutations. All changes are Tailwind token swaps, StatusPill prop assignment, and one new read-only React component (ApprovalTimeline) that consumes existing /api/audit endpoint with documented SUPER_ADMIN gating.
ApprovalTimeline filters on client side (audit endpoint is SUPER_ADMIN-only per existing rolesGuard), component itself is default-collapsed <details> — minimal UI surface, no performance concerns.

rationale: Standard governance, dual-reviewer split-focus (Product + Technical as two Claude agents; no secondary provider on this host). Scope: UI-only repaint of 6 pages to IBM Plex design canon (/calendar, /bookings/new, /bookings/[id]/edit, /repair, /admin, /admin/scanner) + read-only ApprovalTimeline component on /bookings/[id] (SUPER_ADMIN, default-collapsed, consumes existing /api/audit) + aria-label pass across icon-only buttons. Strictly out of scope: schema/API changes, notifications, bulk approve/reject, finance SVG bar rewrite, mobile redesign.

tests.web_suite: apps/web/src/components/bookings/__tests__/ApprovalTimeline.test.tsx — 4 tests (default-collapsed render, filters non-approval entries, handles 403, shows rejection reason)

gates.build: npm --workspace=apps/web run build — 27 routes compile clean; First Load JS unchanged from pre-sprint baseline

scope_notes.new_component: apps/web/src/components/bookings/ApprovalTimeline.tsx — default-collapsed <details>, filters audit stream to BOOKING_SUBMITTED/BOOKING_APPROVED/BOOKING_REJECTED, reverse-chronological sort via ISO-safe a.createdAt.localeCompare(b.createdAt), defensive 403 handling, cancelled-flag cleanup to prevent post-unmount state updates. Only mounted on /bookings/[id] for SUPER_ADMIN.
scope_notes.new_statuspill_variant: 'alert' (bg-rose-soft / text-rose / border-rose-border) — added for MISSING unit status in admin/scanner; complementary to existing rose-soft usage in DayAlert and other destructive-semantic UI.
pages_repainted: /repair — urgency badges + skeleton loaders to canon (a68ad11)
scope_notes.a11y_pass: aria-label added to icon-only buttons across pages and components (0981146)
scope_notes.design_canon_compliance: All repainted pages use canonical Tailwind tokens (ink/surface/border/accent/rose/emerald/amber/teal/indigo/slate with -soft/-border/-bright variants). No hex introduced. Category palette on /bookings/new now distributes categories across 7 unique tints (zero collisions). admin/scanner now uses StatusPill for all unit-status rendering.
scope_notes.no_mobile_redesign: Strictly token swaps; no layout or responsive-breakpoint changes.

deferred_out_of_scope: Email/Telegram notification to SUPER_ADMIN on new PENDING_APPROVAL — deferred from Subproject B, not picked up here (UI-only sprint)
Bulk approve/reject UI for /bookings list — deferred from Subproject B, still future
Finance SVG bars/dynamic category-color dots in apps/web/app/finance/ — 5 instances of style={{}} remain; rewrite needs data-layer redesign, out of scope
Mobile-specific redesign of /calendar desktop grid — explicit scope exclusion
apps/web/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is tracked in git (should be .gitignore-d) — pre-existing tech debt, not introduced by this sprint
